signal: EU Data Act forces connected vehicle data out of OEM silos

targets.title: Fleet Maintenance Prediction via Multi-OEM Telemetry
targets.rationale: Uses the Data Act to pull cross-brand telemetry into one prediction engine for mixed fleets.

targets.title: Post-Sale Vehicle Component Insurance Engine
targets.rationale: Third-party insurance products based on real vehicle health data, previously OEM-only.

signal: UK statutory adjudication forcing mechanism for construction payments

targets.title: Automated Statutory Adjudication Dossier Generator
targets.rationale: Automates the evidence collection and claim generation for SME subcontractors.
